name: Scorer Validation Relevance review for Model Choice and Student-Simulation Validity Update bundle
summary: Accepted with boundary. None of the three new sources validates an automated scorer or supports synthetic-only validation. Their relevance is to model-choice criteria, response realism, simulated-learner validity, and reporting controls.

findings.claim_or_issue: The new findings are scorer-adjacent only through response-generation and simulation-quality conditions.
findings.why_it_matters: The application memo should not convert student-simulation validity evidence into scorer-validity evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Use the new records to refine model-choice and reporting criteria while preserving held-out real-response validation as the scorer evidence standard.
